name: Can Induced Emotion Bias LLM Behaviors in Sequential Decision Making?

description: arXiv:2607.12631v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents in high-stakes domains, understanding contextual factors that may modulate their decision-making becomes critical. While LLMs are trained to perceive and resonate with users' emotions, it remains unclear whether induced emotion can influence their sequential decision-...
author: Minh Khoi Ho, Zihao Zhu, Runchuan Zhu, Levina Li, Zhiwen Fan, Zhangyang Wang, Junyuan Hong
